title: hulsea callicarpha
intro: Hulsea callicarpha is a perennial plant species, also known as Mountain Gold, that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is a rare and unique plant found in the mountainous regions of California and Oregon in the United States. Traditionally, Hulsea callicarpha has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's root and leaves can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which may offer health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
